title: Back At It Again!
description: A Mod that brings back old removed items into newer version of Minecraft.
body:
# Preface

I made this mod solely because I wanted the Nether Reactor when I am playing on my own modpack with [Moderner Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta) and I want to relive the Minecraft Pocket Edition moments I sorely miss.

# Soooo... What's in this mod
So far, **almost fully working** Nether Reactor Core along with Glowing Obsidian, original Stonecutter, both info_update blocks along with their original textures as an option.

Check out the Gallery page for more images!

***P.S. The Nether Spire does NOT generate by default for world safety reasons. To turn it on, set the gamerule "backatitagain.doSpireSpawn" to TRUE***

## Nether Reactor Core Recipe
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VhKrbC1r/images/d2529c5b7ef712aa2a6aa31677d892f2f5ce40d5.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VhKrbC1r/images/d2529c5b7ef712aa2a6aa31677d892f2f5ce40d5.png)
## Stonecutter Recipe
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VhKrbC1r/images/c7cdb41bb096b96d6b71f2305c94d36457191e45.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VhKrbC1r/images/c7cdb41bb096b96d6b71f2305c94d36457191e45.png)

# Why remake the textures?
I don't know. I just wanna give it a bit of a facelift for them to fit in better with the modern times.

# What shader?
Complementary Unbound.

# How do I manually spawn the spire without the reactor? Asking this for a friend.
`/place template backatitagain:nether_spire`
